name: compute_fibonacci
command: python3 -c 'def fib(n): return n if n < 2 else fib(n-1) + fib(n-2); print(f"Fib(30) = {fib(30)}")'

name: process_data
command: echo 'Processing data...'; sleep 2; echo 'Data processed successfully'

name: backup_files
command: echo 'Starting backup...'; sleep 3; echo 'Backup complete: 1024 files copied'
